title: Motifity's Copper Tools
description:
Imported copper tools for 1.20.1, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.21.8!

Motifity's copper tools adds copper axe, copper pickaxe, copper sword, copper shovel, copper hoe and copper nugget (idk why I added it)
body:
# About mod
Imported copper tools for 1.20.1, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.21.8, 1.20.4!

(Small mod)

(This mod does not require any other mods to work.
Memory using 778 KB)

Motifity's copper tools adds copper axe, copper pickaxe, copper sword, copper shovel, copper hoe and copper nugget (idk why I added it)

This is a complete transfer of copper tools (the only difference is in the properties of the tools)

If you need copper tools for 1.20.1, then this mod is a good option,
also this mod is a good addition to your game!

Made on Mcreator (Currently only for Forge 1.20.1, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, Neoforge 1.21.8, 1.20.4, and Fabric 1.21.8)
# Screenshot
![Zombie with copper sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73b114ffa4b204ba3127e9a42e04925917e5b4a1.png)
# Plans
1. Import this mod for Neoforge 1.21.8 (Completed)

2. Import this mod for Fabric 1.21.8 (Completed) fabric api needed https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/versions?g=1.21.8!

3. Add more languages

4. Import this mod for Forge 1.19.2 (Completed), 1.19.4 (Completed)
# Languages
Languages supported:
- Russian
- English
- Spanish (1.0.1)
# Credits
Motifity
